title: pyrenaria pahangensis
intro: Pyrenaria pahangensis, also known as the Pahang Pyrenaria, is a species of plant in the family Theaceae, native to Malaysia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Pyrenaria pahangensis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. It is often prepared in herbal tea form by infusing the dried leaves in hot water, or in the form of a decoction to extract its medicinal compounds.
